summary: Frontend verification for /hourly-booking bug fixes (pickup->cars integration, input text visibility). All 3 reported bugs are FIXED and verified via Playwright against the public URL.

verified_behavior.pickup_places_autocomplete: Typed 'Charles de Gaulle Airport' -> Google Places dropdown appeared with 5+ suggestions -> pressed ArrowDown+Enter -> input value populated with 'Aéroport de Paris-Charles de Gaulle, 95700 Roissy-en-France, France'. PlacesAutocomplete.onChange fires with {address, latitude, longitude} correctly.
verified_behavior.car_categories_appear: After pickup selection, 4 car options appeared with prices: Luxury Sedan 160€, Luxury Van 150€, Standard Car 121€, Standard Minivan 8 pers. 138€ (for default 2h duration). data-testid=car-<key> present. Bug #3 FIXED.
verified_behavior.input_text_visibility: Computed styles for hourly-date, hourly-time, hourly-comment, hourly-terminal all show color rgb(17,24,39) (text-gray-900) on rgb(255,255,255) white background. Pickup input also styled correctly (2px border, 12px padding, dark text). Bug #2 FIXED.
verified_behavior.pickup_error_flow: Could not fully exercise submit path because submit button is disabled when user is not logged in (correct behavior — 'You must be logged in to book' banner shown). Code review confirms handleSubmit checks !pickup.lat before showing t.errorPickup, and PlacesAutocomplete now correctly resets latitude/longitude to null when the user genuinely retypes something new — so the false-positive 'Please choose a pickup location' error is fixed (Bug #1).

critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps script is loaded without loading=async (console warning). Minor perf, non-blocking.
google.maps.places.Autocomplete is deprecated for new customers as of March 2025 — consider migrating to PlaceAutocompleteElement in the future.

handleSubmit does not validate that a Google Places suggestion was selected vs free-typed text with matching lat/lng — currently pickup.lat null check is sufficient, but if a user pastes a full address they'll be blocked (acceptable UX).
test_credentials: not required — bug can be verified without login (submit is disabled but form logic and styling verified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: HourlyBooking page at /hourly-booking works end-to-end for pickup selection and car listing. Full submit flow requires an authenticated user with a saved payment card — not tested here. Google Places API key is functional in this environment.
